Journal.Title: Journal of vascular surgery cases and innovative techniques
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: J Vasc Surg Cases Innov Tech

Article.ArticleTitle: Endovascular repair of subacute complicated type B aortic dissections using the Castor branched endograft and the STABILISE technique.

Abstract.AbstractText: We present a novel, fully endovascular technique for subacute complicated type B aortic dissection, combining the Castor single-branched endograft with the stent-assisted balloon-induced intimal disruption and relamination in aortic dissection repair method to achieve zone 2 sealing, left subclavian artery preservation, and complete aortic remodeling. This standardized, anatomically tailored strategy avoids hybrid procedures and enhances procedural reproducibility. We applied this approach in three patients with complex anatomies, all treated successfully without complications or reinterventions. Our experience supports the safety and effectiveness of this technique, offering a promising alternative for the management of complicated type B aortic dissection during the subacute phase.
